description: Downloadable starter examples for the Grudge 3DFX viewer. All files are served directly from ObjectStore.

js.name: JS Modules
js.desc: ES module helpers for loading registries and effects

json.name: JSON Templates
json.desc: Starter 3DFX definitions you can edit and re-upload

glsl.name: Shader Snippets
glsl.desc: GLSL code matching the viewer's uniform/varying contract

examples.name: Embed an Effect in Three.js
examples.desc: Standalone HTML page that fetches any effect by ID from ObjectStore and renders it with OrbitControls.

examples.name: Grudge 3DFX Loader (ESM)
examples.desc: Tiny ES module that exposes loadGrudge3DFX() and loadGrudge3DFXExamples() for any project.

examples.name: Save Custom Effect to R2
examples.desc: POST a 3DFX definition to the objectstore.grudge-studio.com Worker using an API key.

examples.name: Effect Definition Template
examples.desc: Blank 3DFX definition with every supported key documented.

examples.name: Fragment Shader Snippet
examples.desc: GLSL fragment shader scaffold matching the viewer's uTime/uColor1/uColor2/uIntensity contract.
